title: BEM-606 conflict safe workflows
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'WORKFLOW_CONFLICT_SAFE_COMMIT_POLICY.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-606 | Workflow Conflict-Safe Commit Policy'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:13 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Проблема'+sep+sep+'Параллельные workflow пишут в `governance/transport/results.jsonl`. При `git pull --rebase` возникает конфликт на append-only файле, из-за чего GitHub Actions шлёт оператору ложные fail-уведомления.'+sep+sep+'## Решение'+sep+sep+'1. Автономные dispatcher/router workflow больше не коммитят общий `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.'+sep+'2. Каждый workflow коммитит только свои state/report/inbox/task файлы.'+sep+'3. Каноничный transport остаётся для Deno/Codex tasks, где коммит выполняется централизованно.'+sep+'4. Для workflow-доказательств используются `governance/reports/*` и `governance/state/*`.'+sep+sep+'## Цель'+sep+sep+'Убрать конфликтный шум и не ломать roadmap при параллельных фоновых действиях.'+sep)

workflow_adds={
 'mailbox-dispatcher.yml':'git add governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json governance/reports/mailbox_dispatcher_result.md',
 'operator-decision-dispatcher.yml':'git add governance/state/operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json governance/reports/operator_decision_dispatch_result.md',
 'operator-reply-intake.yml':'git add governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json governance/operator_decisions governance/tasks/pending governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md',
 'decision-curator-handoff.yml':'git add governance/state/decision_curator_handoff_state.json governance/curator/inbox governance/reports/decision_curator_handoff_result.md',
 'curator-inbox-router.yml':'git add governance/state/curator_inbox_router_state.json governance/role_orchestrator/inbox governance/tasks/pending governance/reports/curator_inbox_router_result.md',
 'role-orchestrator-internal-router.yml':'git add governance/state/role_orchestrator_internal_router_state.json governance/internal_contour governance/tasks/pending governance/reports/role_orchestrator_internal_router_result.md'
}
changed=[]
for name,new_add in workflow_adds.items():
    path=wfs/name
    if not path.exists():
        continue
    text=path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    lines=text.splitlines()
    out=[]
    for line in lines:
        stripped=line.strip()
        if stripped.startswith('git add ') and 'governance/transport/results.jsonl' in stripped:
            indent=line[:len(line)-len(line.lstrip())]
            out.append(indent+new_add)
        else:
            out.append(line)
    new_text=sep.join(out)+sep
    if new_text!=text:
        path.write_text(new_text)
        changed.append(str(path))

report=reports/'bem606_conflict_safe_workflow_commits.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-606 | Conflict-Safe Workflow Commits | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:13 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Updated autonomous dispatcher/router workflows so they do not commit shared `governance/transport/results.jsonl`. This removes the merge-conflict source shown in GitHub Actions screenshots.'+sep+sep+'## Changed workflows'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x for x in changed])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem606_conflict_safe_workflow_commits','cycle_id':'bem606-conflict-safe-workflow-commits','source':'gpt','status':'completed','changed_workflows':changed,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:13 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem606_conflict_safe_workflow_commits']={'status':'completed','changed_workflows':changed,'policy':str(protocol),'blocker':None}
state['workflow_conflict_safe_commit_policy']='dispatcher_router_workflows_do_not_commit_transport_results_jsonl'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:13 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem606_conflict_safe_workflow_commits.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-606 PASS: dispatcher/router workflows no longer commit shared transport/results.jsonl.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+changed)
ops_applied.append('Removed governance/transport/results.jsonl from dispatcher/router workflow commit steps to prevent parallel rebase conflicts')
"""
No issue comments.
